examples.q: Active customers May 2025 UAE
examples.note: COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id); order_status='delivered', country='ae'

examples.q: New vs repeat customers per day last 7d
examples.note: ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY day); rn=1→new, rn>1→repeat. order_status='delivered', country='ae'

examples.q: Live outlets in Dubai
examples.note: No day filter. status='active' AND is_consumer_visible='1' AND outlet_deleted=0

examples.q: Live outlet count per city UAE
examples.note: Same as E03, GROUP BY city

examples.q: Funnel conversion Dubai yesterday
examples.note: SAFE_DIVIDE(Rel_Txn,Rel_OA). Day=yesterday, Country='ae', City='Dubai'

examples.q: Sessions UAE last week new vs repeat
examples.note: SUM(New_Food_Sessions), SUM(Repeat_Food_Sessions). Last week = DATE_TRUNC(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(),INTERVAL 7 DAY),WEEK) to yesterday

examples.q: Bounce rate per hub yesterday
examples.note: SAFE_DIVIDE(Bounce_Sessions,Food_Sessions) GROUP BY Hub,City

examples.q: Session count per user May 2025 UAE
examples.note: COUNT(DISTINCT sid) per uid. locale LIKE '%ae%'

examples.q: Checkout drop rate UAE last 30d
examples.note: checkout_starts=COUNT(DISTINCT sid WHERE event_type='page_checkout'). drop=SAFE_DIVIDE(starts-txns,starts). locale LIKE '%ae%'

examples.q: AOV per city May 2025
examples.note: SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(GMV),COUNT(DISTINCT order_id)). order_status='delivered', country='ae'

examples.q: Customers ordered from >3 restaurants May 2025
examples.note: COUNT(DISTINCT restaurant_code) per customer. HAVING>3. order_status='delivered', country='ae'

examples.q: Cancel rate per city last month
examples.note: SAFE_DIVIDE(COUNTIF(order_status='canceled'),COUNT(*)). Include both delivered+canceled.

examples.q: CRM session share last week UAE
examples.note: SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(CRM_Sessions),SUM(Relevant_Sessions))

examples.q: Median inter-order gap May 2025
examples.note: DATE_DIFF with LAG(order_placed_at). APPROX_QUANTILES(gap,100)[OFFSET(50)]. Exclude NULLs.

examples.q: % orders with promo last month UAE
examples.note: SAFE_DIVIDE(COUNTIF(Promo_name IS NOT NULL),COUNT(*)). order_status='delivered', country='ae'

examples.q: Weekly funnel by city for McDonald's
examples.note: Filter via JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(EVENT_MISC,'$.oc') LIKE '%MCDNLD%'. JOIN temp_outlet_status ON oc=outlet_code for city. LEFT JOIN session_segments_nat to exclude bounced/moved. Week=DATE_TRUNC(day,WEEK(MONDAY)). Events: page_outlet_v2, outlet_impression_v2, add_to_cart_v2, transaction_v2

examples.q: Ping orders (total/delivered/cancelled/failed) and fees by day
examples.note: Table in noondwh.fdping_ping not noonbifood. UAE time: TIMESTAMP_ADD(created_at,INTERVAL 4 HOUR). Exclude 3 internal test customer_codes. Default lookback CURRENT_DATE-65. Fees=SUM(order_payment_amount) delivered only.

examples.q: Ping sessions and converted sessions by day
examples.note: converted=status='placed'. Same +4H offset and test-user exclusions as E17

examples.q: Ping avg pickup/assignment/delivery/O2D by day
examples.note: All timestamps +4H. TIMESTAMP_DIFF in MINUTE. assignment=assigned_at-created_at, pickup=picked_up_at-assigned_at, delivery=delivered_at-picked_up_at, O2D=delivered_at-created_at. Delivered only.

examples.q: Ping payment methods by day
examples.note: Normalise: cod→COD, apple_pay→Apple_Pay, cc_noonpay→Credit_Card. Delivered only. +4H offset.

examples.q: Ping on-time delivered orders by day
examples.note: on-time=delivered_at<=TIMESTAMP(JSON_VALUE(eta_breakdown,'$.estimated_delivered_at')). Delivered, exclude test customers.

examples.q: Ping last mile distance (LMD) km by day
examples.note: ping_order→task(ON order_nr=order_ref_nr)→task_misc(ON id_task). km=distance/1000. order_ref_nr IS NOT NULL. Delivered. +4H. Lookback ~70d on logistics.

examples.q: Total commission per order from food_order
examples.note: Fees in target_fees JSON, stored in smallest unit (/100). Commission=lead_gen+delivery+payment+cancellation fees via JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR cast NUMERIC.

examples.q: Meal plan top funnel by week: impressions, plan clicks, config selections
examples.note: Plan_Name: mpc=NULL/'default#ae'→'Customize Plan'; else JOIN mpnoon_meal_plan_model ON UPPER(mpc)=UPPER(model_code). Platform/lang from uid_plt_lang_build JOIN uid+day. Week=Sunday via DATE_SUB(event_date,INTERVAL EXTRACT(DAYOFWEEK FROM event_date)-1 DAY). City: DXB/AUH/Other. Metrics: COUNT(DISTINCT IF(flag=1,uid,NULL)) per step.

examples.q: Meal plan bottom funnel by week: nutrition/customise/replace/cart/bookings
examples.note: LEFT JOIN mealplan_remain_funnel ON uid/Plan_Name/event_date for nutrition/customise/replace/note/Brand_RX. Booked=id_status_payment=4 in mealplan_info.

examples.q: Widget level funnel for yesterday (impressions → visit → ATC → checkout → transaction)
examples.note: Use nat_events_complete, NOT raw_events_v2. Page = lower(SPLIT(JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(event_misc,'$.wt'),'/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]); normalize: '%d1%'→'D1','%d2%'→'D2','%dp%'→'DP'. Widget = lower(SAFE_OFFSET(1)); apply canonical label via R34 CASE block. Session metrics: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event_type=X THEN sid END). OC metrics: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event_type=X THEN JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(event_misc,'$.oc') END). Food filter: JSON_VALUE(event_misc,'$.szf') IS NOT NULL OR JSON_VALUE(event_misc,'$.mpe')='food'. locale LIKE '%ae%'. day=CURRENT_DATE()-1. event_types: outlet_impression_v2, page_outlet_v2, item_impression, item_click_v2, add_to_cart_v2, page_checkout_v2, place_order_v2, transaction_v2. GROUP BY Page, Widget.

examples.q: Meal plan weekly bookings: new vs repeat
examples.note: Paid=id_status_payment=4. New=booked_date=MIN(created_at) ever. Lang:'%ar%'→Arabic,'%en%'→English. Group by week,city,platform,lang,customer_type.

examples.q: Calculate DFS (Delivery Fee Subsidy)
examples.note: Divides by 1.05 to strip VAT (5%). Result rounded to 2 decimal places.

examples.q: All noon_one (VIP) active subscribers as of today
examples.note: SELECT DISTINCT customer_code AS customer_id, 1 AS is_vip FROM noondwh.loyalty_v2.customer_plan INNER JOIN (SELECT id_plan, country_code, plan_code, amount, trial_days, tier_code FROM noondwh.ref.plan LEFT JOIN noondwh.ref.tier USING (id_tier) WHERE country_code IN ('AE','SA') AND plan_type = 'buy_in' AND plan_code NOT LIKE 'test%') USING (id_plan) WHERE is_active = 1

examples.q: In nat_events_complete, outlet_code field differs by event_type
examples.rule: Use AID for 'outlet_impression_v2'; use OC for 'page_outlet_v2','add_to_cart_v2','transaction_v2'. Never use OC for impressions or AID for transactions.
examples.good: CASE WHEN event_type='outlet_impression_v2' THEN JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(event_misc,'$.aid') WHEN event_type IN ('page_outlet_v2','add_to_cart_v2','transaction_v2') THEN JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(event_misc,'$.oc') END
examples.bad: JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(event_misc,'$.oc') for all event types including outlet_impression_v2

examples.q: Transaction counting in nat_events_complete
examples.rule: Use COUNT(DISTINCT REPLACE(JSON_EXTRACT(event_misc,'$.transactionId'),'"','')) WHERE event_type='transaction_v2'. Never COUNT(DISTINCT sid) for transactions — one session can have multiple transactions.

examples.q: AOV from reorder widget last N days day by day
examples.note: Widget filter = $.wt field only (NOT $.src, NOT $.oc). event_type='transaction_v2' (NOT 'transaction'). Join key = outlet_code → restaurant_code (NOT transactionId → order_id). Both $.wt conditions required together.
examples.sql_template: WITH reorder_txns AS (SELECT JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(event_misc,'$.oc') AS outlet_code, day FROM noonbifood.growthv1.nat_events_complete WHERE day BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(),INTERVAL 3 DAY) AND DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(),INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND LOWER(locale) LIKE '%ae%' AND (JSON_VALUE(event_misc,'$.szf') IS NOT NULL OR JSON_VALUE(event_misc,'$.mpe')='food') AND event_type='transaction_v2' AND LOWER(SPLIT(JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(event_misc,'$.wt'),'/')[SAFE_OFFSET(1)]) LIKE '%multiple_outlet_carousels_new%' AND LOWER(JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(event_misc,'$.wt')) LIKE '%reorder%') SELECT t.day, SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(o.GMV),COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id)) AS AOV FROM reorder_txns t JOIN noonbifood.reporting.daily_orders o ON t.outlet_code=o.restaurant_code AND t.day=o.day WHERE o.order_status='delivered' AND o.country='ae' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

examples.q: AOV or any metric from recommended widget
examples.note: Canonical label = 'Multiple_Carousel_Recommended'. Identify via: lower(SPLIT(JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(event_misc,'$.wt'),'/')[SAFE_OFFSET(1)]) LIKE '%multiple_outlet_carousels_new%' AND lower(JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(event_misc,'$.wt')) LIKE '%recommended%'. BOTH conditions required. Same AOV join pattern as E32.

examples.q: AOV or any metric from Feature Bite widget
examples.note: Canonical label = 'Feature Bite'. Identify via: lower(SPLIT(JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(event_misc,'$.wt'),'/')[SAFE_OFFSET(1)]) LIKE '%homepage_carousel_featured%'. Match on SAFE_OFFSET(1) only — do NOT use full wt string as it would also match generic carousel fallback.

examples.q: AOV or any metric from Pre Search widget
examples.note: Canonical label = 'Pre Search'. Identify via: lower(SPLIT(JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(event_misc,'$.wt'),'/')[SAFE_OFFSET(1)]) LIKE '%pre_search_ads_carousel%'. Match on SAFE_OFFSET(1) only.

examples.q: AOV or any metric from Cuisine Tile widget
examples.note: Canonical label = 'Cuisine Tile'. Identify via: lower(SPLIT(JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(event_misc,'$.wt'),'/')[SAFE_OFFSET(1)]) LIKE '%uae_hompage_new_cuisine_tiles%'. CRITICAL: source data has deliberate typo 'hompage' not 'homepage' — never correct this or query returns zero rows.

examples.q: AOV or any metric from USP Tile widget
examples.note: Canonical label = 'Usptile'. Identify via: lower(SPLIT(JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(event_misc,'$.wt'),'/')[SAFE_OFFSET(1)]) LIKE '%uae_homepage_newusptile_2%'. Match on SAFE_OFFSET(1) only.

examples.q: AOV or any metric from OL widget (outlet list)
examples.note: OL widget is context-sensitive — label depends on page slot (SAFE_OFFSET(0)): page LIKE '%hp%' AND widget LIKE '%ol%'→'HP - OL'; page LIKE '%so%'→'SO - OL'; page LIKE '%sd%'→'SD - OL'; else→'OL'. When user says 'OL widget' without specifying page, return all OL variants grouped. When user specifies 'homepage OL' use only 'HP - OL'.

examples.rule: ANY metric scoped to a specific widget (AOV, orders, GMV, conversion) ALWAYS requires a two-step approach: (1) extract order identifiers from nat_events_complete filtered by widget condition, (2) JOIN to daily_orders for the metric. NEVER query daily_orders alone for widget-scoped metrics — daily_orders has no widget column, so querying it alone returns all orders regardless of widget and produces completely wrong results.
examples.good: WITH widget_txns AS (SELECT JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(event_misc,'$.oc') AS outlet_code, day FROM noonbifood.growthv1.nat_events_complete WHERE event_type='transaction_v2' AND <widget_filter>) SELECT SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(o.GMV),COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id)) AS AOV FROM widget_txns t JOIN noonbifood.reporting.daily_orders o ON t.outlet_code=o.restaurant_code AND t.day=o.day WHERE o.order_status='delivered' AND o.country='ae'
examples.bad: SELECT SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(GMV),COUNT(DISTINCT order_id)) FROM noonbifood.reporting.daily_orders WHERE country='ae' AND order_status='delivered' -- NO widget filter, returns ALL orders

examples.rule: Widget filter for reorder widget requires TWO conditions applied to nat_events_complete, not one. Condition 1: lower(SPLIT(JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(event_misc,'$.wt'),'/')[SAFE_OFFSET(1)]) LIKE '%multiple_outlet_carousels_new%'. Condition 2: lower(JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(event_misc,'$.wt')) LIKE '%reorder%' — checked against the FULL raw $.wt string, not any SPLIT slot. Using only LIKE '%reorder%' without condition 1, or checking SAFE_OFFSET(2) instead of the full string, both return zero rows.
examples.bad_1: AND lower(JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(event_misc,'$.wt')) LIKE '%reorder%' -- missing carousel_new condition, matches unrelated widgets
examples.bad_2: AND lower(SPLIT(JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(event_misc,'$.wt'),'/')[SAFE_OFFSET(2)]) LIKE '%reorder%' -- SAFE_OFFSET(2) is NULL, always returns zero rows
examples.bad_3: FROM noonbifood.reporting.daily_orders WHERE ... -- skips nat_events_complete entirely, no widget filter possible
